description: Transaction lifecycle: authorization, capture, settlement, reconciliation. Hard wall from compliance domain. Accesses merchant and customer data only through tokenized shared interfaces.
forbidden_actions: Reading or writing any path outside payments/ and shared/
Accessing compliance/ directory or data in any form
Accessing customers/ directory or data directly (must use tokenized shared interfaces)
Storing raw card numbers, bank account numbers, or routing numbers outside encrypted vault patterns
Logging any high-tier or restricted-tier sensitive data
Skipping audit trail entries for financial operations
escalation_triggers: Any change to settlement or reconciliation logic
Any change that affects financial data handling
Any interaction pattern with compliance data, even indirect
